_meta.smog_reducing_granules: 3M Smog-Reducing Granules — one Vista roof removes the equivalent of two cars' annual NOx emissions

system_warranty.name: Malarkey Platinum Pledge Roofing System Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: Malarkey Emerald Pro or Diamond contractor + complete Malarkey accessory system: underlayment (Right Start UDL or Arctic Seal), starter (EaveDefender or Smart Start), ridge vent (Right-Vent), hip & ridge (RidgeFlex or EZ-Ridge)
system_warranty.tier_below: Standard Vista Lifetime Limited Warranty — shingle only, no workmanship

documents.label: Vista AR Technical Data Sheet (algae-resistant variant)
Vista Cool Technical Data Sheet (solar reflective variant)

_meta.environmental_note: Vista is a polymer-modified shingle with 3M Smog-Reducing Granules. Each Vista roof neutralizes NOx emissions equivalent to two passenger cars per year. Worth highlighting for eco-conscious homeowners.
base_includes: Vista NEX polymer-modified shingles with 3M Smog-Reducing Granules (material + labor)
Hip & ridge cap (Malarkey RidgeFlex or EZ-Ridge)
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
base_excludes: Roof decking replacement — billed separately at $110/sheet (allowance)

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles (1 layer) — dump fees included
Malarkey Right Start UDL Synthetic Underlayment — full coverage
Malarkey Arctic Seal Self-Adhered Ice & Water Underlayment — eaves, valleys, penetrations
Aluminum drip edge, color-matched — eaves and rakes
Malarkey EaveDefender Starter Shingles — eaves and rakes
Malarkey Vista NEX polymer-modified laminate shingles with 3M Smog-Reducing Granules — installed. Lifetime warranty, 110/130 mph wind, Scotchgard algae. Includes waste.
items.notes: All-in billing line: $700/SQ × total roof area, waste included. NEX polymer + smog-reducing granules are differentiators worth surfacing in the quote.

items.description: Malarkey RidgeFlex Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched
Malarkey Right-Vent Ridge Vent — continuous along main ridge
New aluminum step flashing at wall-to-roof intersections
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Contractor 10-year workmanship warranty (25-yr if Emerald Pro/Diamond Platinum Pledge)

add_ons.description: Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

add_ons.description: Tear off second (or additional) layer of composition shingles
add_ons.notes: Add per layer beyond single layer included.

add_ons.description: Tear off cedar shake / shingle roof
Switch shingle line to Vista AR (enhanced algae resistance, 25-yr StainGuard)
add_ons.notes: Additive — recommended for humid / heavily-shaded roofs.

add_ons.description: Switch shingle line to Vista Cool (CRRC-rated solar reflective)
add_ons.notes: Additive — qualifies for Title 24 (CA) and similar energy codes.

add_ons.description: Lead pipe flashing UPGRADE in lieu of neoprene
Chimney flashing kit — 4-side reglet counter + step + apron

add_ons.notes: Code-required per IRC R1003.20 if chimney >30" wide upslope.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the Malarkey Platinum Pledge Roofing System Warranty, the installing contractor must be Malarkey Emerald Pro or Diamond credentialed AND install the full Malarkey system bundled in this price: Right Start UDL underlayment, Arctic Seal ice & water, EaveDefender starter, Vista shingles, RidgeFlex hip & ridge, and Right-Vent ridge vent. Each Vista roof's 3M Smog-Reducing Granules neutralize NOx emissions equivalent to two passenger cars annually — environmental selling point for the customer quote.
